actions.name: 逾期天数_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 逾期天数_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT fdsq1.sid,
       fdsq1.fdbh,
       fdsq1.yshrq,
       fdsq1.shrq,
       fdsq1.shje,
       fdsq1.yqts,
       fdsq1.khmc
FROM fdsq1 
WHERE (fdsq1.khmc=[放单申请.客户编号]) 
  AND (fdsq1.ywyq="是") 
ORDER BY fdsq1.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应出运明细
actions.caption: 对应出运明细
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid 
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[放单申请.发票号码]) 
  AND ((cymx.zdry=:c_user) 
  OR (cymx.yw LIKE :c_depart)) 
ORDER BY cymx.sid ASC

actions.name: 事_发票简写
actions.expression: select fphm from cymx where (fphm like concat("%-",[放单申请.发票简写])) and (cysb="是") and (ifnull(chyrq,"")<>"") limit 1
actions.caption: 事_发票简写

view.params:
SELECT cymx.fphm
FROM cymx
WHERE (cymx.fphm=cymx.chydh) and (ifnull(cymx.chyrq,"")<>"") 
  and (cymx.yw LIKE :_user_org_path_,"%") and (cymx.hxdate<>"是")

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%单证%")

SELECT DISTINCT(spwt.dlr),spwt.yhms
FROM spwt
WHERE   ([放单申请.业务] like concat("%",replace(LEFT(fdsq,CHAR_LENGTH(fdsq) - 1),'\\','\\\\'),"%")
  concat("%",spwt.fdsq,"%") and (spwt.dlr<>:_user_username_) and (spwt.yhms>20) 
  and ifnull(fdsq,'')<>'' and ifnull(fdsq,'')<>'无' and (spwt.yhms<31) order by spwt.yhms desc

  and ifnull(fdsq,'')<>'' and ifnull(fdsq,'')<>'无' and (spwt.yhms=1) order by spwt.yhms desc

select fphm from cymx where (fphm like concat("%-", fpjx)  and (cysb="是") and (ifnull(chyrq,"")<>"") limit 1

SELECT cymx.fphm
FROM cymx
WHERE (cymx.kh_id=[放单申请.客户编号]) and (cymx.xybx=[放单申请.是否信保]) and (cymx.RMBkh=[放单申请.RMB客户]) 
  and (cymx.fphm=cymx.chydh) and (ifnull(cymx.chyrq,"")<>"") and permission('出运明细')
